description.en: Send a message to a contact via iMessage.
description.de: Eine Nachricht über iMessage an einen Kontakt senden.

prompt.macos: /osascript -e 'tell application "Messages" to send "{{MESSAGE}}" to chat id "any;-;{{RECIPIENT}}"'

inputs.name: Recipient

description.en: Phone number or Apple ID email of the recipient

inputs.bot: The recipient's phone number (e.g. '+1234567890') or Apple ID email address. Use the contact handle from imessage-list if available.

inputs.name: Message
inputs.bot: The message content to send via iMessage. Keep it concise.
